/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libcontextsqueeze.so -o ../../bin/libcontextsqueeze.so CMakeFiles/contextsqueeze.dir/src/contextsqueeze.cpp.o CMakeFiles/contextsqueeze.dir/src/contextsqueeze_vision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/contextsqueeze.dir/src/metrics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/contextsqueeze.dir/internal/core/signature_registry.cpp.o
